name: IRC_REC_EVENTS_B
description: This is the base table to store the event related details

columns.Name: EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of the table. Auto generated.

columns.Name: APPLIED_METRICS_DAYS
columns.Comments: Specifies the Applied metrics timeframe In days.

columns.Name: HIRED_METRICS_DAYS
columns.Comments: Specifies the Hired metrics timeframe In days.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS_F table.

columns.Name: EVENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The unique number which gets generated to represent an event.

columns.Name: EVENT_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the start date of the event.

columns.Name: EVENT_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the end date of the event.

columns.Name: EVENT_CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Category code of the event which is configured in HCM_LOOKUP table. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_REC_EVT_CATEGORY.

columns.Name: EVENT_OWNER_ID
columns.Comments: Person id of the event owner. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the Object as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_OBJECT_STATUS.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: APPLY_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: To store the registration form id of an event. Foreign key to IRC_APPLY_FLOWS_B table.

columns.Name: EVENT_LAST_REG_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the last date for registration.

columns.Name: EVENT_VISIBILITY_CODE
columns.Comments: To store the visibility code of the event. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_REC_EVT_VISIBILITY.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the published event as a lookup code. The lookup type is ORA_IRC_REC_EVT_PUBLISH_STATUS.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the start date and time of the published event.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the end date and time of the published event.

columns.Name: PUBLISH_TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the time zone used of the published event.

columns.Name: HRT_POOL_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the hrt pool id. Foreign Key to hrt_pools_b table

columns.Name: EVENT_TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the timezone of the event.

columns.Name: EVENT_CREATION_MODE
columns.Comments: Stores the event creation mode. It uses the lookup type ORA_IRC_REC_EVT_CRE_MODE

columns.Name: PHASE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the phase code of the event, the corresponding look up type is ORA_IRC_REC_EVT_PHASE_CODE

columns.Name: MAX_REG_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the maximum registration allowed for an event

columns.Name: ENABLE_INTERVIEW_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether interview is enabled or not for this event.

columns.Name: MANUAL_REGN_CONFIRM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores Manual registration status for this event.

columns.Name: POOL_MEM_PROC_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_PROCESSES_B table. Stores the ID of the process template that registrations on this event will follow.

columns.Name: EVENT_LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments:
Stores the timestamp at which corresponding
 row has last updated.

columns.Name: WALKIN_REGISTRATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate if on-spot registration is enabled for this event or not.

columns.Name: QR_CODE_CHECKIN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate if qr code checkin is enabled for this event or not

columns.Name: REMINDER_NOTIFICATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if reminder notification is sent to the candidate.
